# Memory — Gary

This file is the rival's persistent memory of past encounters with the player.

The bridge appends a new entry here every time `/rival-event`, `/rival-battle-plan`, or `/rival-battle-summary` fires. Each entry captures what happened in the game world and how the rival reacted — so the rival can reference past events in future encounters.

**Do not edit this file by hand during normal operation.** It is the rival's living memory; let the bridge own it. You can clear it before a clean demo run if needed.

## Format

Each entry is a markdown section with a UTC timestamp header followed by structured fields:

```
## YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM
Trigger: <event type>
Details: <key=value, ... — map IDs are resolved to names where possible>
Map: <map name> (<map_group>:<map_num>)
Player party size: <n>
Rival said: <the message GPT generated>
```

The rival's GPT prompt sees the most recent N entries (default 60 lines). Older entries fall out of context naturally.
